titleStmt.title: SII 6.713: original edition by K. V. Subrahmanya Aiyer
No. 713. (A.R. No. 251 of 1899). IN THE SECOND NICHE OF THE SAME VERANDAH. On either side of the inscription is carved a double-headed cow flanked by a parasol.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrīśākavarṣē riṣigaganabhujakṣmāmitē bhadrakāmādhīśāhē bhaumavārē surabhi
kulabhavo gaṁggarājābhidhānaḥ . svāyurvvaṁśābhivridhdhyai naraharibhavanē
paṁcchasaṁkhyākamāḍāḥ prādādācaṁdratāraṁ hariśikharitaḷē puṣpavāṭīnimittaṁ [. 1*]
svavētanabhujaḥ paṁcchanarānārāmapālinaḥ nṛharēstatra saṁjātapuṣpānayanatatērpparān [.]
Akalpayadayaṁ bhūyaḥ svarājyasyābhivridhdhayē [.] sa gātsyamadagōtraikamaṁḍanaḥ prithivīpatiḥ
svasti śrī . śakavarṣa 1207 gunēṭi bhādrapada śukla trayōdaśiyu maṁggaḷavāramunāṁḍu surabhivaṁśōdbha
va gātsyamadagōtrulaina jaṁttaṟunāṭa gaṁggarājulu tamaku Āyurārōgyeśvaryyābhinriddhigā śrīnarasiṁhā
nāthuni śrībhaṁḍāramunaku gaṁḍalu Ēnu māḍalu Acchi Adhivaramuna paṁddumu kṣētramugoni pratidivasamu
puṣpamālalu cātuṭaku puṣpavāṭika peṭṭiri Ī tōṁṭṭasēsaḍidāsarulu Ēvuraku tārakūḍu
jītamu peṭṭaṁggalāru Īṁddula phalavastu śrībhaṁḍāra pravēśaṁ cēyaṁggalāru Ī dharmmu śrīvaiṣṇava rakṣa
śatruṇāpi kritō(ḥ) dharmmaḥ pālanīyō manīṣibhiḥ . śatrurēvahi śatrusyāddharmmaśatrurnna kasyacit .
Digital edition of SII 6.713 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
